batchFulfill(uint256[],bytes).details: Batch fulfill multiple intents with a composite solution

params.intentIds: Array of intent IDs to fulfill

cancelIntent(uint256).details: Cancel an intent (only creator can cancel)

params.intentId: The ID of the intent to fulfill
params.solution: The solution/data for fulfilling the intent

getIntent(uint256).details: Get a specific intent by ID

getOpenIntents(uint8).details: Get all open intents of a specific type

params.intentType: The type of intents to retrieve

params.expiresAt: Unix timestamp when intent expires (0 = never expires)

returns._0: intentId The ID of the submitted intent
